default.lead: I've been running media operations since I was fourteen.
default.body: Editor, consultant, creative director — three shapes of the same practice. I've built meme communities, youth supplements, satirical weeklies, and platform-agnostic media products. I write. I ship. I hire. I read.
items: Edited and authored Disconnect - A Collection of Short Stories
Maintained Rantages, a user-generated content ecosystem, for 17 years
Edited SHOUT at twenty-four — a first for the industry
Youngest Head of Digital at UNB
Built Rantages into a self-sustaining operation with zero investment
Introduced lean workflows into UNB's multimedia production

Rantages.lead: I started Rantages at fourteen. And it's still running.
Rantages.body: What began as a Facebook page became Bangladesh's first online meme community — 310,000 followers, a creator network, and a proprietary CMS I built from scratch. Zero investment. Seventeen years and counting.
items: Founded Bangladesh's first large-scale user-generated content community
Built a proprietary CMS from scratch with no prior technical training
Scaled to 310,000+ followers with no external funding
Turned Rantages into a self-sustaining operation through multiple platform shifts

SHOUT.lead: Youngest editor of SHOUT — The Daily Star's youth supplement.
SHOUT.body: I spent six years on SHOUT's editorial board before taking the lead at twenty-four years of age. The work was about rebuilding the content mix, recruiting a new generation of writers, and establishing a pipeline of young talent into serious newsroom careers.
items: Youngest supplement editor in The Daily Star's history
Designed the editorial approach for a younger, more critical readership
Recruited and developed writers making their first attempts at journalism
Established a talent pipeline into the broader Daily Star group

The Daily Star.lead: Head of New Media at The Daily Star. Newsroom-wide digital transformation.
The Daily Star.body: Joined the main newsroom to lead digital distribution strategy — integrating SEO, multimedia production, and social media into the editorial workflow. Built internal automation tools and then moved into product management for the paper's full digital transformation programme.
items: Led digital distribution across one of South Asia's largest English-language newsrooms
Integrated SEO and multimedia production into daily editorial operations
Built workflow automation tools deployed across the newsroom
Managed the product roadmap for The Daily Star's digital transformation

UNB.lead: Youngest Head of Digital in a newsroom of record.
UNB.body: Joined UNB to lead its entire digital operation — strategy, content planning, multimedia production, and team development. The work was as much infrastructure as editorial: building systems that turned reactive day-to-day decisions into structured, measurable forward planning.
items: Youngest Head of Digital in a newsroom of record
Designed and implemented UNB's editorial planning infrastructure
Introduced lean workflows into multimedia production
Restructured the digital desk around measurable content strategy
Introduced Content KPIs that measured success
